name: db-2-ai-dsl-workspace
description: Langium workspace for db2ai — relational DB to MCP tools

scripts.build: tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && npm run bundle:mcp-runtime && npm run build --workspaces
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.extension:release:vsix: NAME=$(node -p "require('./packages/extension/package.json').name") && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./packages/extension/package.json').version") && gh release create "${NAME}-${VERSION}" "packages/extension/${NAME}-${VERSION}.vsix" --title "${NAME} ${VERSION}" --notes "Internal test build of the db2ai Cursor/VS Code extension." --prerelease
scripts.release:verify: npm run test && npm run check
scripts.release:vsix: npm run release:verify && npm run release:package && npm run extension:release:vsix
scripts.test: npm run langium:generate && npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run --workspace packages/language test && npm run --workspace packages/cli test
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:mcp:pagila && npm run test:mcp:sakila
scripts.test:coverage: npm run --workspace packages/language test:coverage && npm run --workspace packages/cli test:coverage
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
